author: @Clonekiller66

text: Morshu hasn't got a defense weapon, but he's got healing skills, right? Then, Instead of ''Morshu doesn't attack'', he will use healing and then defeat Ganon more easily. And It should end on this part, but... Of course I like your videos!
author: @Kapptour

text:
Well... The rupees heal drains a LOT of mana... and Morshu only has enough mana to use it once per battle... until he gains more levels.
If I remake the serie, I will add mana bars in the menu... so that you can't get confused like that^^
author: @Themysteriouspirate

text: No other skills?
author: @Kapptour

text: Nope... the only other defence skill he has is the iron armor... but he can only use it in his metal form.
author: @Themysteriouspirate

text: What about a dispelling skill to remove the Ganon's Shield effect?
author: @Kapptour

text: Morshu don't have dispelling skills...
author: @Themysteriouspirate

text: This is my last option: After Ganon activates the shield, Morshu instantly transforms into his metal form.
author: @Kapptour

text: He can't... the transformation isn't a skill... it can only be used outside of a fight.
author: @Themysteriouspirate

text:
Wait... Morshu is a shopkeeper, so can't he bring some potions from his shop into battle?
In RPG games, potions are very useful.
author: @Kapptour

text: He forgot them in his plane...
author: @Themysteriouspirate

text: Alright, I'll pass...
author: @Kapptour

text: Now I have a question... With the last version of Sony Vegas, I can remake the entire serie with a better animation, menus and Mana bers and all... Do you think it's better to remake the serie, or just continue it?
author: @Themysteriouspirate

text: Hmmm... First you better complete the serie. Everyone is waiting for about five years! So, if you make the last part, you can start remaking it. Of course you have a choice: continue the serie or remake it. But I, in your place, will continue. And you can ask them all the same question. And then decide.
author: @Kapptour

text: Did I say part 4 is gonna be the last one?
author: @Themysteriouspirate

text: That's not what I mean, it will be good to make AT LEAST 6 parts(If not counting in the intro).
